title: T4013 ARCHIVED - T3 Trust Guide 2024 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - T4013 T3 Trust Guide 2024
Information for trusts, including testamentary and inter vivos. Includes information on the different types of trusts, filing requirements and information on how to complete the T3 return and certain T3 schedules.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format t4013-e.html PDF t4013-24e.pdf Large print t4013-lp-24e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2023 – Standard print PDF (t4013-23e.pdf) 2022 – Standard print PDF (t4013-22e.pdf) 2021 – Standard print PDF (t4013-21e.pdf) 2020 – Standard print PDF (t4013-20e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (t4013-19e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t4013-18e.pdf) 2017 – Standard print PDF (t4013-17e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (t4013-16e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (t4013-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t4013-14e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t4013-13e.pdf) 2012 – Standard print PDF (t4013-12e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t4013-11e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (t4013-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t4013-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (t4013-08e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (t4013-07e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t4013-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t4013-05e.pdf) 2004 – Standard print PDF (t4013-04e.pdf) 2003 – Standard print PDF (t4013-03e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t4013-02e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t4013-01e.pdf) 2000 – Standard print PDF (t4013-00e.pdf) 1999 – Standard print PDF (t4013-99e.pdf) 1998 – Standard print PDF (t4013-98e.pdf) 1997 – Standard print PDF (t4013-97e.pdf) 1996 – Standard print PDF (t4013-96e.pdf) 1995 – Standard print PDF (t4013-95e.pdf) 1994 – Standard print PDF (t4013-94e.pdf) 1993 – Standard print PDF (t4013-93e.pdf) 1992 – Standard print PDF (t4013-92e.pdf) 1991 – Standard print PDF (t4013-91e.pdf) 1989 – Standard print PDF (t4013-89e.pdf) 1987 – Standard print PDF (t4013-87e.pdf)

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- T3 Statement of Trust Income Allocations and Designations (slip)
- T3RET T3 Trust Income Tax and Information Return
- T3SUM Summary of Trust Income Allocations and Designations

### Give feedback about this page
